summary: Completed full e2e testing for Golevents sports ticket platform. All requested features working: expandable desktop menu with leagues/cups/teams, mobile menu with same structure, events sorted by date (ascending), and clickable team tags on event cards.

desktop_menu.details: ALL CATEGORIES button opens mega menu with LEAGUES (7 leagues with expand arrows) and CUPS (6 cups) sections. Teams expand correctly under each league (tested Serie A with 20 teams).

mobile_menu.details: Mobile hamburger menu shows HOME, LEAGUES section (7 expandable leagues with teams), and CUPS section (6 cups). Serie A dropdown shows all 20 teams in grid layout.

event_date_sorting.details: Events sorted by sort_date ascending (upcoming first) on: Homepage (Feb 27 first), Team pages (Inter: Feb 28, Mar 3, Mar 8...), Cup pages (Champions League: Mar 10, Mar 11...)

team_tag_clicks.details: Clickable team tags on event cards (e.g., INTER, MILAN, LEVANTE) navigate to /team/{team-slug} correctly

league_page_navigation.details: League pages (/league/serie-a) show 'All Teams' grid with clickable team cards. Team cards navigate to team pages.

cup_page_navigation.details: Cup pages (/league/champions-league) show 'Upcoming Matches' with events sorted by date

seed_data_creation: None - used existing event data in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All main features working. Backend uses sort_date field for proper date sorting. Menu structure includes 7 leagues (Serie A, Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Liga Portugal, Ligue 1, Super Lig) and 6 cups (Champions League, Europa League, Coppa Italia, Copa del Rey, FA Cup, DFB Pokal).
